create.title: Create Your Workspace
create.description: Welcome to Qarote! Let's start by creating your first workspace. Workspaces help you organize your RabbitMQ servers and collaborate with your team.
create.tagsPlaceholder: Add tags to organize your workspace
create.tagsHint: Use tags like "production", "development", or "testing" to organize your workspace

error.createFailed: Failed to create workspace. Please try again.
